nasb.text: And an angel of the Lord suddenly stood before them, and the glory of the Lord shone around them; and they were terribly frightened.

esv.text: And an angel of the Lord appeared to them, and the glory of the Lord shone around them, and they were filled with great fear.

cnv.text: 主的一位使者站在他們旁邊，主的榮光四面照著他們，他們就非常害怕。

ccb.text: 忽然，主的天使向他们显现，主的荣光四面照着他们，他们非常害怕。

csbs.text: 这时候，主的一位天使站在他们旁边，主的荣光四面照射他们，他们就大为惊恐。
